title: Fix MaxResponseDistanceBlocks dead config — wire or remove
description:
From audit: ChatOptions.MaxResponseDistanceBlocks is documented but not actually used by ChatInterpreter. Operators tune it believing it works. Either wire it back into IsDirectedAtBot or remove it from public config until behavior returns.

Source: msa_audit_ad2215e-6-24-26.md (Finding 2, 96% confidence), memorysmith_agent_extended_audit (Finding 6, 96% confidence)
